summary: Comprehensive UX testing for 11 mobile/desktop UI issues in BattWheels OS. Tested at both 390px (mobile) and 1920px (desktop) viewports. All reported UX fixes verified working.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <tbody>/<tr>. This is a development warning from React that should be addressed to prevent potential rendering issues in production.

TASK_1_EVFI_Readability.details: EVFIResponseCard.jsx has responsive padding (px-3/py-3 mobile, px-6/py-4 desktop), break-words on all text, flex-shrink-0 on step badges, max-w-4xl on desktop, overflow-hidden container.

TASK_2A_Invoice_Dropdown_Empty.details: Customer dropdown shows existing customers (Amit Saxena, etc). Empty state code verified in InvoicesEnhanced.jsx - shows 'No customers yet' + '+ Add new customer' link when no customers exist.

TASK_2B_Estimate_Customer_Search.details: Typed 'NonExistentCustomer12345' - shows 'No customers found' + '+ Add customer' link. Empty state working correctly.

TASK_2C_Vehicle_Category_Dropdown.details: Dropdown shows 5 categories: 2-Wheeler EV, 3-Wheeler EV, 4-Wheeler EV, Commercial EV (Bus/Truck), Light Electric Vehicle. Each with appropriate icon.

TASK_3A_Sidebar_Label_Contrast.details: Section labels (INTELLIGENCE, OPERATIONS, etc) clearly readable. Nav items use text-bw-white/[0.75] (75% opacity) - good contrast on dark background.

TASK_3B_Single_Close_Button.details: Mobile sidebar has exactly 1 close button (lucide-x icon) in top-right. Escape key and overlay click both close sidebar.

TASK_3C_Dashboard_Tabs_Scrollable.details: Tabs have overflow-x-auto, scrollbarWidth:none. ScrollWidth(478) > clientWidth(356) confirms horizontal scrolling enabled. All 4 tabs present: Workshop Overview, Service Tickets, Receivables Overview, Leaderboard.

TASK_3D_Inventory_Tabs_Scrollable.details: TabsList has 'overflow-x-auto flex whitespace-nowrap'. Shows 7 tabs: Items, Groups, Warehouses, Price Lists, Adjustments, Reports, History.

TASK_4A_Invoice_Date_Not_Truncated.details: Create Invoice dialog shows full date '03/11/2026'. Date input has min-width:140px, width:271px at desktop. No truncation observed.

Desktop_Verification.details: At 1920px: Fixed sidebar visible (288px width), dashboard tabs displayed inline, invoice form renders correctly with proper spacing and date fields.

action_items: Minor: Fix React hydration warnings in ItemsEnhanced.jsx and InvoicesEnhanced.jsx where <span> elements are children of <tbody>/<tr> elements (cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality)
critical_code_review_comments: EVFIResponseCard.jsx: Well-structured responsive component with proper break-words and padding
Layout.jsx: Sidebar contrast values properly set (0.75 for nav items, section labels visible)
Dashboard.jsx: Tabs have proper overflow-x-auto for mobile horizontal scrolling
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo org data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 UX issues verified as fixed at both 390px and 1920px viewports. The EVFI Response Card requires an actual AI diagnostic query to render - component structure verified through code review. React hydration warnings are development-only warnings that should be addressed but don't affect user experience.
